wallpapers.description: Delicate pink cherry blossoms unfurl on a gnarled branch with scattered petals gracefully descending against a stark black backdrop. This immersive 4K parallax wallpaper offers a stunning 3D depth effect, making it a perfect iPhone wallpaper that brings serene natural beauty to your device.
wallpapers.name: Falling Sakura Petals Wallpaper

wallpapers.author: User
wallpapers.description: Elevate your iPhone with this stunning 4K abstract wallpaper, featuring intricate black polygons and subtle silver lines. This dynamic wallpaper provides a unique visual experience with depth and movement as you tilt your device.
wallpapers.name: Abstract Polygon 4K Black Wallpaper

wallpapers.author: User
wallpapers.description: Experience minimalist perfection with this circles 4K wallpaper for your iPhone. This wallpaper features a white semi-circle above a vibrant red arc, all against a deep black backdrop.
wallpapers.name: Minimalist Circles 4K Wallpaper
